# `ResolvedArgValue`

Compute the final value type from config — this is what handlers receive.

Advanced type helper: this powers InferArg and action-handler
inference. Most apps do not need to mention it explicitly.

Variadic args always produce an array. Non-variadic:

- `'optional'` → `T | undefined`
- `'required'` → `T`
- `'defaulted'` → `T`

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: type
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/arg.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/arg.ts:71`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/arg.ts#L71)

## Signatures

```ts
type ResolvedArgValue<C extends ArgConfig> = C['variadic'] extends 'true'
  ? C['valueType'][]
  : C['presence'] extends 'optional'
    ? C['valueType'] | undefined
    : C['valueType'];
```
